name: sa-cowork-persist-extension
description: Desktop extension for testing Cowork persistence with user_config and an explicit config bridge export

tools.name: persist_write
tools.description: Write a value to persistent storage

tools.name: config_report
tools.description: Report the configured extension values available through mcp_config.env without revealing the raw secret

tools.name: bridge_report
tools.description: Write a config summary to a shared bridge file for the Claude-style persist probe to read

probe_secret.title: Probe Secret
probe_secret.description: Secret token to verify sensitive storage works
